name: Applesauce Cake/Butter Frosting
recipeIngredient: 2 3/4 cups Sifted cake flour (or 2 1/2 cups sifted all-purpose flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the cake flour, sugar, baking powder, soda, salt, cinnamon, cloves, and allspice.
4. Add the shortening, water, chopped walnuts, and applesauce to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
5. Beat in the egg for 2 minutes, then mix again for another 2 minutes.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool completely before frosting with white butter frosting.
9. To make the frosting, combine all ingredients in a large bowl until smooth and creamy.
